campaign.bbeg_description: A lich bound to the tides.
campaign.name: The Cursed Coast
campaign.narrator_personality: Grim and theatrical, with a taste for irony.
campaign.setting: A fog-draped coastal city where the dead walk at low tide.

encounter.current_location: You arrive at the fog-shrouded docks of Darkholm at dusk. A sailor's corpse bobs in the black water.
encounter.outcome: The player confronted a cultist and learned of the Drowned Lady.
public_events: Aldric confronted a robed cultist near the dockside warehouse.
encounter.setting: You arrive at the fog-shrouded docks of Darkholm at dusk. A sailor's corpse bobs in the black water.

module.summary: Bodies wash ashore nightly along the Darkholm waterfront.
module.title: The Dockside Murders
